overview.description: The WisdomTree U.S. High Yield Corporate Bond Fund (QHY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks an index composed of high-yield, US corporate bonds. Constituents are selected and weighted by fundamental factors and bond risk characteristics. QHY was launched on Apr 27, 2016 and is issued by WisdomTree.
infoTable: WisdomTree Fundamental U.S. High Yield Corporate Bond Index
